props.title: SG/Send — Zero-Knowledge File Sharing
props.subtitle: Your files, encrypted in your browser. The server sees nothing.

items.title: 🔐  Encrypted Transfer
items.description: AES-256-GCM in the browser. The server stores only ciphertext — never filenames, never keys, never plaintext.

items.title: 📁  Encrypted Vault
items.description: A versioned, encrypted folder. Push, pull, branch. Share a read-only snapshot via a Simple Token. The server sees nothing.

items.title: 📄  Page Layout Renderer
items.description: Turn any vault folder into a rich web page — hero, cards, gallery, callouts — all rendered from a _page.json file.

items.title: Healthcare
items.description: Patient records and imaging reports shared between clinicians without touching a third-party server.

items.title: Legal
items.description: Client documents, NDAs, and case files — end-to-end encrypted before they leave the office.

items.title: Journalism
items.description: Source documents and sensitive briefings shared with editors without metadata exposure.

items.title: Finance
items.description: Deal room materials and term sheets in an encrypted vault the investor browses directly.

props.title: Open Source · Apache 2.0
props.text: The full source is public. No hidden server-side decryption possible — you can verify the encryption yourself at any time.

props.title: Browser — encrypt locally
props.text: Web Crypto API generates AES-256-GCM keys locally. Files encrypted before any network call. Key stays in the URL fragment — never transmitted to the server.

props.title: Server — ciphertext only
props.text: Stores only encrypted ciphertext. No filenames. No keys. No plaintext — ever. Two Lambda functions: Public (transfers) and Admin (tokens). Memory-FS storage abstraction.
